Taichi Kamei

3rd Year Engineering Physics · UBC

I am interested in Mechatronics including all of electrical, mechanical, and computer engineering fields. I am also interested in simple yet asthetic designs such as MUJI products. My hobbies are golfing and ricing my Linux setup.

GitHub Email

Work Experience

Quantum Photonic Researcher Co-op — UBC Quantum Matter Institute
May - August 2026

Will be testing and verifying a low-noise amplifier PCB for the single photon detector RF analysis

Education

B.ASc Engineering Physics — University of British Columbia
2023 – Present

Relevant Courses: Electric Circuit Analysis, Signals and Systems, Digital Systems and Microcomputers, Software Construction, Solid and Fluid Mechanics, Mechanical Designs, Thermodynamics, Statistical Mechanics, Quantum Mechanics

Projects

Drone Flight Controller

Building drone from a ground up with a team of three. We are at the stage of designing flighter controler PCB are at the stage of designing flighter controler PCB.

  • PCB Design
  • Embedded C++ & Rust
  • Kalman Filter
  • RF
  • UART
  • SPI
  • I2C
  • ESP32

Autonomous Pet-Rescue Robot

Autonomous robot for UBC's Engineering Physics robot competition — navigated a line-following course, retrieved animal plushies using a custom robotic arm with LiDAR detection, and deployed a basket mechanism to deliver them to a safe zone.

  • ESP32
  • C++
  • FreeRTOS
  • KiCad
  • LiDAR
  • PCB Design
  • CAD

Autonomous Clue Detect Robot

Autonomous robot for the ENPH 353 competition — navigated a Gazebo/ROS simulation environment, performed line following with dual-line PID, and read roadside clues using a custom CNN-based OCR pipeline.

  • ROS
  • Python
  • Computer Vision
  • PID
  • Gazebo
